title: Categorical Encoding Path
description: Build fluency in Categorical Encoding inside Data Preprocessing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Target Encoding
steps.summary: Target Encoding belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Encoding and Target Networks. It opens into Ordered Target Encoding and Bayesian Target Encoding.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Memory Encoding
steps.summary: Memory Encoding belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Encoding and Memory network. It opens into Spatial Memory Encoding and Temporal Memory Encoding.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Byte Pair Encoding
steps.summary: Byte Pair Encoding belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Encoding. It opens into Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) and Byte-Pair Encoding Embedding.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Feature Hashing
steps.summary: Feature Hashing belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Feature. It opens into Hash Encoding (Feature Hashing) and Feature Hashing for Trees.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: One-hot Encoding
steps.summary: One-hot Encoding belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Encoding. It opens into One-Hot vs Target Encoding in Trees and One-Hot Encoding (for discretized bins).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Byte Pair Encoding (BPE)
steps.summary: Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Byte Pair Encoding and Encoding. It opens into Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) Embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Hash Encoding (Feature Hashing)
steps.summary: Hash Encoding (Feature Hashing) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Hash Encoding and Feature Hashing.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Numerical Encoding for Cyclic Features (sine/cosine transform for time/date)
steps.summary: Numerical Encoding for Cyclic Features (sine/cosine transform for time/date) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Categorical Encoding. Start after Sine-Cosine Encoding for Time Features and Encoding.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
